features.title: Claude-Code pi-workflows runner
acceptance_criteria: executeWorkflow / parseWorkflowSpec / findIncompleteRun / createAgentLoader reachable via file:// loader from dist/
CLI surface run/resume/status/list functions headless

features.title: Workflow bridge scripts: render_from_substrate.py + apply_from_substrate.py
acceptance_criteria: render_from_substrate.py emits the per-spec prompt JSON from .workshopping
apply_from_substrate.py parser-gates a response and writes a versioned draft

features.title: 14-spec pi-workflow YAML (per WORKSHOPPING-WORKFLOW-SPEC)
features.description: Per WORKSHOPPING-WORKFLOW-SPEC: per-spec render->call->apply with draft_path threading.
acceptance_criteria: YAML drives all 14 specs in dependency order
commands emit JSON; agent input is an object {prompt:…}

features.title: First run + per-spec quality iteration -> promotion-ready draft (DISC-26 closure)
features.description: Execute the sequence end-to-end and iterate per-spec quality to a promotion-ready whole-plan draft, closing DISC-26.
acceptance_criteria: 14-spec sequence runs headless against the Chiway dev-DB; run dir captured
per-spec quality evaluation yields a promotion-ready whole-plan draft

features.title: Prompt-level: bake plan-quality heuristics + authoritative WASC structure into generation
features.description: Govern the 14 spec snippets + shared preamble so the generated draft natively satisfies the binding heuristics (R-0009), the authoritative reviewer feedback (R-0007), the authoritative ACS-WASC structure (R-0008), and the role model (DEC-48). Decomposed into slices: A (prompt-only register+content), B (in/out-of-class grounding), C (grounding-leanness), D (measurement-binding gate). Criterion 7 (per-Goal header) RELOCATED to FEAT-007 (net-new model/parser, not a prompt bake). Sources: docs/prompt-workflow-refinement-governing-options-2026-06-08.md (R-0011).
acceptance_criteria: Generated action steps distribute ownership across the divisions/positions whose responsibilities justify them; no single-department overload.
The plan covers both in-class and out-of-class contexts, using the seeded SAO + HRT/YGL/Dormitory Teacher out-of-lesson roles.
Relevant actions carry bilingual (Chinese-English) dual-purpose framing.
Each action step states its mechanism (HOW) and its frequency/cadence.
Action steps span diverse focus areas (school-wide), not concentrated.
Each success criterion binds a concrete measurement instrument + cadence; KPI exclusion held (numbers only inside a target criterion).
Descriptions never meta-invoke WASC certification/accreditation risk; a standard is given as key + name; Theme is the title, not success-criteria narrative.
Verbatim catalogue-label fidelity is preserved (no contraction/rename).
Each spec's grounding carries only what its task consumes (grounding-leanness).

features.title: Workflow-level: maximalist->target transform/distiller stage
features.description: Govern a new post-generation transform stage (after the 14-spec sequence) that takes the maximalist draft to the concise target band (canonical + Sample-2 anchors). Conforms to R-0005 (distillation + coverage floors + existence-gate safety), R-0006 (option matrix + 2026 heuristics), R-0009 (extrapolation license). Option detail + sources: docs/prompt-workflow-refinement-governing-options-2026-06-08.md (R-0011).
acceptance_criteria: A post-generation transform produces a concise plan in the target band (canonical mock + Sample-2 anchors) without loss of signal.
Coverage floors are enforced: owners (incl. SAO/out-of-lesson roles), stakeholders, and measurement-tools are never zeroed by the transform.
Grounded extrapolation is permitted (distribute ownership, surface out-of-lesson roles, bilingual dual-purpose) bounded by catalogued entities + verbatim labels + no fabricated metrics + re-gating.
The transform output re-validates via the existing parse (planner/specs.py) + catalogue-gate (_freetext_audit.py) + promotion-gate (_check_promotion_gates) harness.
A distance-to-target-band scorer measures conformance (two anchors) = the DISC-26 / quality-rubric gate.
Iterate-to-band uses a judge model distinct from the generator (grounded self-correction).
Optionally, the 5 step-iterating specs may fan out per action-step (per-step parallel decomposition).

features.title: Structural: ACS-WASC per-Goal HEADER layer (model + parser + grounding + spec)
features.description: Relocated from FEAT-005 criterion 7 (it is NOT a prompt bake): the authoritative ACS-WASC per-Goal header fields do not exist in the model/parser today (verified: plans/models/plan.py has current/desired/rationale/theme/priority but NO supporting_data / measurable_growth_targets / gap_closure_strategies / monitor / report). Net-new structural feature: extend the Plan model (or a GoalHeader model) + parser contract + grounding emitter + a draft spec to carry the per-Goal header layer, per R-0008 + R-0010. Larger, multi-day; reconcile measurable_growth_targets with the KPI exclusion (DEC-40/specs.py:33-34). Sequenced after FEAT-005's prompt slices.
acceptance_criteria: The plan model + parser carry the ACS-WASC per-Goal header fields: rationale + supporting data, measurable growth targets, SLO/critical-need linkage, gap-closure strategies, monitor, report.
A generation spec drafts the per-Goal header from grounding; the parser validates it; the canonical render displays it.
measurable growth targets reconcile with the KPI exclusion (quantified outcomes vs standalone KPIs).
The full project gate stays green; the per-Goal header appears in a generated + rendered draft.

features.title: Incorporate the validated sim-land planning findings into the prompt-workshop corpus
features.description: Encode the validated sim-land planning-process findings (runs 001-008; prompt-workshop/sim-revised-frame.md + docs/plan-generation-heuristics.md R-0009) into the prompt-workshop corpus -- the dev-time mode of the production author-assist. Dev-time only; zero parser (planner/specs.py) changes, zero grounding.py changes; the production ai/00NN PromptTemplate migration is a deliberate later bridge, out of scope here. Decomposed into 3 stories: A (cross-cutting render + output rules in the shared preamble -- R1 no-framework-terms, R2 action-steps-are-learning-designed, R4 front-load + three measurement views + durability, R5 growth-mindset register); B (spec-specific -- R5 quarterly review + spiral in spec 14; R3 mission/vision/SLO ideation in specs 03/04/05); C (whole-draft + decision -- R6 verify distributed ownership, R7 coverage eval, R8 options-posture placement decision). Every snippet/preamble body edit mirrors into .workshopping (content_hash re-stamp) and re-passes prompt-workshop/dispatch/verify-render-parity.py (a per-task obligation, not its own task).
acceptance_criteria: A generated plan uses only the school's plain vocabulary -- none of the generation-side framework/process method-terms -- while still showing the method's effects.

Each action a participant meets is an active learning event in plain prose (recall prior -> real task they do -> check understanding -> reflect/next-steps), never transmission-only, never labelled with method scaffolding.
Milestones, success criteria, and action steps visibly cohere with the school's mission, vision, and learner outcomes.
A plan establishes a baseline before action and measures from three points of view (students, staff practice, parents) as durable change confirmed by a later check, not mere occurrence.

The review loop is a quarter-by-quarter evaluate-and-adjust cycle with the first checkpoint before December, a monthly focus that retains priors, and adjustment framed as the system working, not failure.
Action-step ownership is distributed across the divisions whose purview bears on the goal -- no single division a disproportionate share -- and uncovered areas are surfaced as gaps.
The whole assembled draft covers every learner outcome and required area, or surfaces the gap.
Nothing already working breaks: outputs still parse, the catalogue-gate holds, the snippet-substrate parity gate passes, and the project gate stays green.
The options-posture placement is settled and recorded (orchestration / create-plan-UX layer; per-spec generation stays decide-one).

features.title: Hard-verification-gated autonomous dev-loop harness for the trio build
features.description: The development harness for building the production orchestration trio (US-LLM-23/24/25 + the 3 assists) under hard verification, per ~/.claude/plans/sequential-dreaming-cocke.md + DEC-58. Per trio slice: ONE runnable HARD gate (`make verify-slice`) composing the slice's behavioral pytest tests + the project static gate + context-validate + (where applicable) _check_promotion_gates-as-a-test; the slice's acceptance_criteria are authored as those tests BEFORE IMPL (gate-first). An agent loop runs IMPL -> gate -> re-IMPL (fresh agent, full state) until the gate exit code is 0, bounded by a hard iteration cap (then STOP+escalate, mandate-008), then a mandatory SEPARATE adversarial audit; done = gate exit 0 AND audit findings == 0. TWO-CLASS gate (DEC-58/DEC-53): only the semantic/behavioral core + this-slice-introduced soundness blocks; cosmetic/style, language WARNs, and pre-existing/unrelated/flaky failures are NON-BLOCKING (recorded as Flags) so trivia never blocks and the loop never hangs. Reuses existing primitives (Makefile gate, gate-before-commit.sh, _check_promotion_gates, context-validate); adds no orchestration engine; reintroduces no retired-workshop code. Proven on the trio's first slice; the trio's full slice decomposition is a separate pre-impl step reusing this harness.
acceptance_criteria: There is one runnable command per trio slice whose exit code alone decides verification: exit 0 if and only if the slice's behavioral acceptance tests pass, the project static gate is green, the context cascade validates, and (where the slice touches promotion/draft accumulation) the promotion predicate holds.

A slice's acceptance criteria are expressed as executable tests that are observed failing before the slice is implemented and passing after; the loop's continue/stop decision is that command's exit code, never a model's reading of prose.

A failure that is cosmetic, a language-register warning, or pre-existing/unrelated/flaky to the slice does not block the slice from completing and is recorded rather than dropped; only failures bearing on the slice's behaviour or the soundness it introduced block.

The build loop always terminates: it either reaches a verified state or, after a bounded number of attempts, stops and surfaces the exact unresolved failure to the human; it never loops indefinitely and never silently abandons the work.

A slice is only marked done when both its hard gate passes and an independent adversarial check confirms the criteria are genuinely met (not vacuously passing), and that done-state is machine-checked, not asserted.
The harness is demonstrated end-to-end on the trio's first slice without reintroducing any retired-workshop tooling or adding a new orchestration engine.

features.title: Production orchestration trio (US-LLM-23/24/25) — admin current+desired -> promotion-ready draft
features.description: The production realization of DEC-29's north star (NORTH-STAR.md) per the DEC-57 architecture: a server-side loop drives the 14 dependency-ordered per-element assists against the school's grounding, accumulating a persisted flat draft_state across DEC-33 staged admin review, repairing per-spec failures (degrade-to-Flag, no abort), until the assembled draft passes the real _check_promotion_gates; the admin alone activates it. Built lean in planner/plans/ai reusing the 9 essential families, importing zero retired-workshop/pi-workflows/.workshopping code; every slice gated by the verify-gated harness (FEAT-009 / make verify-slice). Decomposed into slices: (1) the persisted versioned draft_state store [TASK-059, this]; (2) the accumulation seam (fold a parsed prefill into the flat draft_state, by prefill-shape class); (3) the per-spec server-side loop (ground->render->stream->parse->resolve->accumulate); (4) bounded-retry + degrade-to-Flag resilience; (5) the US-LLM-25 gate-closure loop on the saved Plan; (6) final save_nested + admin-promote wiring. Plus the 3 pending per-element assists US-LLM-7/10/15 (pattern-fill).
acceptance_criteria: From an admin's current+desired-state input, the system produces a fully-populated proposed plan draft that passes _check_promotion_gates, with every value drawn from the school's catalogue (no fabrication) and the run completing without aborting (each spec contributes or degrades to a recorded Flag).
The draft accumulates across staged admin review (it survives between stages) and the admin alone activates the final draft; the AI never persists the plan graph directly nor flips lifecycle.
The trio reuses the existing production validators/grounding/promotion-gate and introduces no retired-workshop or new-orchestration-engine dependency.

Every slice of the trio is built through the verify-gated harness: a hard per-slice gate (make verify-slice) passing AND a separate adversarial audit clean, with the done-state machine-checked via context-validate.
